positive: A minimalist, retro-futuristic celestial map design. Focus on a stylized constellation featuring a prominent, detailed crescent moon surrounded by geometric star points and interconnecting ethereal lines. The palette is limited to deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and metallic cream, giving it a vintage scientific illustration feel. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, designed for excellent scalability and clear silhouettes. Include subtle, stylized planetary orbits as abstract arcs. Style: Mid-century modern graphic design, Art Deco influence, clean vector aesthetic. Highly crisp, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, low resolution, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, letters, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, grain, copyright, logo, trademark
